org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity

Class OpenableDocumentFileFilter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.io.filefilter.MultiFileFilter
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity.OpenableDocumentFileFilter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    FileFilter, FilenameFilter

    public class OpenableDocumentFileFilter
extends MultiFileFilter
    File filter that is for all the documents openable by the editor.
    Version:
    NetEditor Android Panel $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    NGRFileFilter, GMLFileFilter, GXLFileFilter, GraphMLFileFilter
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel
